Sandbox Observability Help

Snapshot
  Inspect current sandbox state.

  snapshot
    Show live sandbox state.

Trace
  Inspect a trace waterfall.

  trace
    Render one flow as a span waterfall.

Events
  Inspect domain-fact events.

  events
    List domain-fact events across traces.

Resources
  Inspect manager-owned resource metrics.

  resources
    Read manager-owned sandbox resource metrics.

Daemon
  Inspect daemon self-metrics.

  daemon
    Read one sandbox daemon's bounded self-metrics.

Topology
  Inspect workspace process topology.

  topology
    Read one sandbox's workspace process topology.

Cgroup
  Inspect resource series.

  cgroup
    Resource series for a scope (cpu/mem/io + disk).

Layerstack
  Inspect layerstack inventory.

  layerstack
    Per-layer leasing/booking inventory, and stack series.

Resource isolation
  Qualify observability memory and storage isolation.

Resource efficiency
  Qualify sandbox resource efficiency.

Use:
  sandbox-observability-cli OPERATION
